Manages flash storage and logging for debug data with boot generation organization and SPI flash logging.


## Files
- **[debug_db.c](debug_db.c.md)**: Manages flash storage for debug data, organizing files by boot generation and handling file headers.
- **[debug_db.h](debug_db.h.md)**: Header file for managing debug database operations, including initialization and address retrieval.
- **[flash_logging.c](flash_logging.c.md)**: Implements a system for logging messages to SPI flash memory with a rolling log mechanism.
